description_long: This is a medium-sized domestic chicken with a robust, rounded body covered in light brown and tan feathers. Its head is adorned with a prominent pinkish-red comb and wattles, and it has a short, conical beak. The bird's wings are held slightly away from its body, revealing layered feathers with a subtle scalloped pattern. Its legs are sturdy and yellow, ending in three forward-facing toes and one rear toe, all tipped with claws. The tail feathers are short and slightly rounded, with darker shading near the base. The overall appearance is typical of a common backyard hen, suitable for urban or rural environments.
description: A light brown domestic chicken with a pink comb, yellow legs, and a rounded body covered in scalloped feathers. The bird has a short beak and a slightly rounded tail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bird's pink comb, symmetrical wings, and yellow legs with claws.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the bird's profile, beak, and the layered feather pattern along the body and tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rounded tail, back feathers, and the symmetry of the wings and legs.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the bird's head, beak, and feather texture along the body.
attribute_plumage_pattern: scalloped and mottled with subtle gradients of light brown and tan
